items.title: Former private prison official to serve as acting ICE chief
items.dek: Venturella most recently worked for the department overseeing contracts between ICE and various detention facilities. He previously worked for ICE during the Ob
items.body: Venturella most recently worked for the department overseeing contracts between ICE and various detention facilities. He previously worked for ICE during the Obama and George W. Bush administrations. He left the agency in 2012 to work for Geo Group, a private prison company that contracts with the federal government, including for immigration detention. Venturella was at Geo Group for a little over a decade. submitted by /u/miauguau44 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ghana to evacuate 300 from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
items.dek: The foreign minister says the "distressed" Ghanaians registered with the embassy in Pretoria to be evacuated.
items.body: The foreign minister says the "distressed" Ghanaians registered with the embassy in Pretoria to be evacuated.
